ddls:
CREATE TABLE "water_flow" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flow measurement */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "flow_windsor" INTEGER /* Water flow measurement at Windsor point */,
  "flow_other" INTEGER /* Water flow measurement at other points */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the water flow */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, suspect, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_flow_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storage_levels" (
  "storage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage level record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the storage level measurement */,
  "storage_windsor" INTEGER /* Water storage level at Windsor reservoir */,
  "storage_other" INTEGER /* Water storage level at other reservoirs */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  "storage_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the reservoir */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the water (e.g., good, suspect, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_levels_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shortfalls" (
  "shortfall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shortfall record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the shortfall */,
  "shortfall_london" INTEGER /* Water supply shortfall in London region */,
  "shortfall_other" INTEGER /* Water supply shortfall in other regions */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the regions table */,
  "shortfall_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the shortfall (e.g., drought, infrastructure issue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shortfall_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shortfalls_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restrictions" (
  "restriction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restriction record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the restriction is effective */,
  "restrictions_windsor" INTEGER /* Water usage restrictions at Windsor */,
  "restrictions_other" INTEGER /* Water usage restrictions at other locations */,
  "restriction_type" TEXT /* Type of restriction (e.g., outdoor use, indoor use) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the regions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restriction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restrictions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature for the day */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation level for the day */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity percentage for the day */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the weather_stations table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("weather_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was issued */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., flow change, storage level anomaly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of compliance check */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the regulation being checked */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "audit_result" TEXT /* Result of the audit (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, analyst, technician) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "system_component" TEXT /* Component of the system accessed (e.g., reports, alerts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., reservoir, weather station) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "weather_station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "weather_station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., ground-based, satellite-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_station_id")
)
